attributes.additional_details:
We call on the Prime Minister to seek an immediate general election to allow the electorate to determine the future direction of the country.”

“We believe that the current Government no longer reflects the will of the electorate due to recent political changes. A general election would restore democratic accountability and allow voters to choose their preferred leadership.”
attributes.background: We believe that recent political developments have significantly affected public confidence in the current Government. A general election would give voters the opportunity to express their views and ensure that the Government has a clear and current democratic mandate to govern.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
